mapper.sql: user_id, city, introduce, fans_count, follow_count, like_count, gender, birthday, level, points, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_user_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user_info SET points = points + #{points}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tb_user_info SET level = #{level}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user_info ( user_id, gender, birthday, city, introduce, level, points, fans_count, follow_count, like_count, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, COALESCE(#{gender}, 0), #{birthday}, #{city}, #{introduce}, COALESCE(#{level}, 1), COALESCE(#{points}, 0), 0, 0, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE gender = COALESCE(#{gender}, gender), birthday = COALESCE(#{birthday}, birthday), city = COALESCE(#{city}, city), introduce = COALESCE(#{introduce}, introduce), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user_info SET like_count = GREATEST(0, like_count + #{delta}), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tb_user_info SET follow_count = GREATEST(0, follow_count + #{delta}), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tb_user_info SET fans_count = GREATEST(0, fans_count + #{delta}), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT like_count FROM tb_user_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user_info SET like_count = #{likeCount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM tb_user_info WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY user_id LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
